raw_consumer_statement: I Purchased a VIP membership in an online gaming site, that was supposed to provide me with 24 hour redemption of winnings. This was never the case. Initially I was able to redeem some winnings, but then there was delay upon delay upon delay, until finally the merchant abruptly closed my account, while he still owed me {$25000.00}, changed its rules regarding redemptions, absconded with the rest of my money in the account, closed their customer service phone line, and website to any further communication. I reported this in a timely fashion to Citibank, my credit card company, and they have all the documents related to this dispute, and for some strange reason ( that was never explained ) decided to give me only a provisional credit for a total on {$990.00}, instead of the full amount charged {$29000.00}. When I contacted citicard dispute department, they said simply that they were reversing the provisional credit, but couldn't tell me why they did not pursue the matter with the merchant. To my knowledge, the merchant chose to ignore their inquiries, just like the merchant has ignored me. The merchant is known as XXXX and from what I have been able to tell from an online chat forum, I am not the only person that this happened to. In other words, there is widespread fraud regarding this merchant, and Citibank refuses to pursue it. If CFPB would like these documents, please provide a fax number that I can send them to.
